reviews.author: Google reviewer
reviews.text: Knowledgeable, reliable, honest, hard working group of some of the nicest folks.

counts.total_available: 42 Google reviews (many appear to be employee reviews)

notes: REVIEW-THIN + MARKET MISMATCH: Cleveland Electric Company (Cleveland Group Inc) is a large commercial/industrial specialty contractor — NOT a residential trade business. Founded 1925, 5th-gen family, client list includes Vogtle Nuclear Plant ($315M contract), GM, Ford. 42 Google reviews largely appear to be employee/partner reviews, not customer reviews typical of the residential trade prospect pool. Only 1 verbatim review captured. Flagged for Jesse review before publish — may not fit the local-trade outreach template.

capture_attempts.reason: 1 verbatim surfaced; others appear to be employee reviews
rich about-us content, no customer testimonial section
